title: Rich Velvety Irish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Irish dish featuring lamb, cocoa powder, and citrus, with a velvety texture and nostalgic flavor, wrapped in a ssam-wrap for a unique twist, and incorporating anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the cocoa powder, orange zest, and orange juice, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth, carrots, potatoes, turmeric, and ginger, and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Braise the stew for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
To serve, place a portion of the stew onto a ssam-wrap leaf and fold to enclose.
